info.title: Livestorm
info.description: Livestorm API for managing webinar events, sessions, participants, and webhooks. Supports event scheduling, participant registration, and engagement data retrieval.

get.description: Test whether your API token or OAuth2 access token works.
Retrieve the currently authenticated user and organization.
Get the currently connected workspace organization.
List the events of your workspace.

parameters.name: filter[created_since]
parameters.description: Filter events created after this timestamp (Unix or ISO 8601)

parameters.name: filter[created_until]
parameters.description: Filter events created before this timestamp

parameters.name: filter[updated_since]
parameters.description: Filter events updated after this timestamp

parameters.name: filter[updated_until]
parameters.description: Filter events updated before this timestamp

parameters.name: include
parameters.description: Related data to include: sessions, tags

post.description: Create a new event or duplicate an existing one.

put.description: Update an event with its full list of attributes.

post.summary: Create a session for an event

get.summary: List people linked to an event
get.description: List all the people linked to all the sessions of an event.

get.summary: Get a person for an event

post.summary: Assign a tag to an event

delete.summary: Remove a tag from an event

get.description: List all the participants of a session.

delete.description: Remove a registrant from a session using their email address.

post.summary: Bulk register people for a session

get.summary: Get a person for a session

delete.summary: Remove a person from a session

get.description: List all the people belonging to your workspace who engaged with one of your event sessions.
List the people_attributes of your workspace.

apiKey.name: Authorization
apiKey.description: API key authentication. Pass as 'Bearer {api_key}' in the Authorization header.
